login.title: Sign in

login.inviteBanner: Sign in to accept your team invitation

form.submitHelp: Press Enter or click to sign in

errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before signing in
errors.accountLocked: Your account has been locked. Please contact support
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later
errors.networkError: Network connection error. Please check your internet
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later

google.userNotFound: No account found for this Google account

google.serverError: Server error. Please try again later

signup.title: Create account
signup.description: Enter your information to get started
signup.inviteBanner: Create an account to accept your team invitation

emailVerification.title: Check your email!
emailVerification.description: We've sent a verification link to
emailVerification.checkInbox: Please check your inbox and click the verification link to activate your account. The link will expire in 24 hours.
emailVerification.step2: Find the email from us (check spam if needed)

messages.termsError: Error: You must agree to the terms and conditions
messages.accountCreated: Account created successfully. Please verify your email.

errors.mustAgreeToTerms: You must agree to the terms and conditions
errors.userAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in instead.
errors.emailMismatch: This invitation was sent to a different email address.
errors.invitationExpired: This invitation has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.invitationNotFound: Invalid invitation. Please request a new one.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

success.title: Check your email
success.description: We sent a reset link to
success.checkInbox: Check your inbox and click the link to reset your password.
success.correctEmail: Make sure you entered the correct email
success.waitAndRetry: Wait a few minutes and try again

errors.checkEmailRetry: Check your email and try again.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: We've sent a verification link to your email address

loading.title: Verifying email
loading.description: Please wait while we verify your email address

failed.title: Verification failed
failed.description: We couldn't verify your email address

errors.userNotFound: No account found associated with this link
errors.invalidToken: The verification link is not valid
errors.tokenExpired: The verification link has expired. Sign up again to receive a new one

unable_to_create.title: Unable to sign in
unable_to_create.description: We couldn't complete your request. Please try again or contact an administrator.

generic.title: Authentication Error
generic.description: Something went wrong during authentication. Please try again.
